reading.title: Reading: Life used to be different
reading.passage: I used to play football every weekend when I was young. I used to live in the countryside. We didn't use to have a car back then. I used to walk to school for thirty minutes every day. We no longer live like that nowadays.

questions.question: The writer used to have a car.
questions.explanation: "We didn't use to have a car back then."

questions.question: How did the writer use to get to school?
questions.explanation: "I used to walk to school for thirty minutes every day."

reading.title: Reading: What did they say?
reading.passage: Mai said that she was tired yesterday. He told me that he worked at a big company. She claimed that the result was correct. The manager announced that the meeting would start at nine.

questions.question: Mai said that she was tired.
questions.explanation: Câu đầu nêu rõ điều này.

questions.question: What did the manager announce?
questions.explanation: "The manager announced that the meeting would start at nine."
